title: Marketplace Manager - Dunzo - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Dunzo - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo family as a Marketplace Manager in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
